nodes.name: 人类活动扰动

nodes.name: 麦哲伦海峡
nodes.summary: 麦哲伦海峡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括黑冠白颈鹭、Grey-flanked cinclodes、Patagonian mockingbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 智利

nodes.name: Grey-flanked cinclodes
nodes.summary: Grey-flanked cinclodes（Grey-flanked cinclodes，学名 Cinclodes oustaleti），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the grey-flanked cinclodes is found in mainland South America, in Chile from the Antofagasta Region and in western Argentina from Mendoza Province, in both countries south to the Strait of Magellan

links.label: 分布于

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: baeckstroemii is found only on Alejandro Selkirk Island in Chile's Juan Fernández Archipelago. The grey-flanked cinclodes inhabits open grassy and rocky landscapes, and in mountains is often found near streams

links.label: 分布于

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered uncommon to fairly common and its habitat "is subject to only minimal human disturbance other than grazing"
